RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_SETTINGS.page_descri: Global switches for persona selection and token series availability.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_SETTINGS.gameplay.de: These options apply globally across all profiles: Starting Initial Point defaults to off, while starting persona selection defaults to on.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_SETTINGS.enable_star: At run start, every player automatically obtains Initial Point and loses 1 Gold.
Control whether the first actual event pull in Act 2 is replaced with Astral Relic Store.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_SETTINGS.content_mod: Keep only Astral's original core gameplay: personas, token series, Starting Initial Point, Astral Relic Store, and Extreme Mode. Other modpack extensions stay visible but locked in settings, and are hidden from room gameplay settings.
Enable the full integrated extension set, including variants, Lucid Dream, Dream/Enigmatic series, extra Neow options, Moon shop slots, and other expanded Astral content.
Switch between Vanilla Mode and Modpack Mode. Each mode keeps its own separate configuration.
When you switch modes, Astral immediately loads that mode's own gameplay settings. The room gameplay panel and Lucid Dream side panels also refresh to match.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_SETTINGS.enable_star: Enable Starting Ring of Seven Curses
At run start, every player automatically obtains Ring of Seven Curses. When enabled, the default random extra Neow pool no longer includes Ring of Seven Curses.
If disabled, the run fully skips the starting persona selection and no player starts with a persona relic.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_SETTINGS.enable_vari: Control whether variant personas can appear during the starting persona selection for this run. If disabled, no variant personas are added at run start.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_SETTINGS.enable_drea: Control whether Dream-prefixed Astral event content can appear in this run.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_SETTINGS.enable_enig: Control whether Enigmatic-prefixed Astral content, including its Neow branch, is enabled in this run.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_SETTINGS.enable_moon: Control whether shops always add three extra Moon relic slots below the normal inventory.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_SETTINGS.enable_neow: Control whether Astral's randomized fourth Neow option appears at run start.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_SETTINGS.enable_luci: Control whether the Lucid Dream panels are shown in the room and whether Lucid Dream effects are active for this run.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_SETTINGS.enable_coll: Control whether collectors cards can appear through normal card rewards and other standard card acquisition paths in this run.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_SETTINGS.neow_extra_: Forced Neow Extra Option
Choose the extra Neow option shared by all players this room, or keep the existing deterministic random behavior.
Default
Use the current deterministic random selection from the available candidate pool.
Face the Shadow
Force every player's extra Neow option to be Face the Shadow.
Ring of Seven Curses
Force every player's extra Neow option to be Ring of Seven Curses.
Absolute Form
Force every player's extra Neow option to be Absolute Form.
Prophecy: Soul Devour
Force every player's extra Neow option to be Prophecy: Soul Devour.
Mid Prophecy: Endless Cloning
Force every player's extra Neow option to be Mid Prophecy: Endless Cloning.
Dream: Coin Explosion
Force every player's extra Neow option to be Dream: Coin Explosion.
Dream: Disintegration Claw
Force every player's extra Neow option to be Dream: Disintegration Claw.
Tetra: Warforge
Force every player's extra Neow option to be Tetra: Warforge.
The extra Neow option is disabled, so the forced-selection setting above is preserved but does not take effect this run.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_SETTINGS.ban.title: BAN
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_SETTINGS.ban.descrip: Manage content excluded from related offer pools in a separate section. Changes apply to new runs only.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_SETTINGS.other.title: Other
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_SETTINGS.other.descr: Additional reserved toggles and experimental options.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_SETTINGS.compat.desc: Show the linked mods that Astral currently integrates with.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_SETTINGS.compat.page: Review the crossover mods Astral currently supports and whether each one is loaded.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_SETTINGS.compat.sect: This page lists the linked mods that Astral can currently integrate with.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_SETTINGS.compat.intr: This list shows the crossover mods Astral currently supports, including each mod name, mod id, and current load status.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_SETTINGS.enable_all_: Show every registered persona at run start instead of only a player-count-based subset.

At run start, additionally show every built-in Astral variant persona. Requires the Variant Personas master switch to remain enabled. Crossover variants that require linked mods are excluded. Changes apply to new runs only.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_SETTINGS.enable_extr: If combat is not won by the end of the player-side turn 16, that combat immediately counts as a loss.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_SETTINGS.starting_pe: Choose one fixed starting-persona rule. Clicking any mode switches and saves it immediately.
Choose starting personas normally. If multiple players choose the same persona, stable rock-paper-scissors resolves ownership.
Choose starting personas normally. Multiple players can choose and directly receive the same persona.
Show a candidate list equal to player count, disable manual choice, and automatically assign one result to each player after 5 seconds.
All players choose normally first, then one submitted persona is chosen deterministically and granted to everyone.
Show a candidate list equal to player count, disable manual choice, then deterministically choose one shown persona for everyone after 5 seconds.
Only the host's chosen persona takes effect, then the locked result is granted to every player. Other players' choices do not count.
Starting persona selection is disabled, so the persona-related settings above are preserved but do not take effect this run.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_SETTINGS.enable_vari: Variant personas are disabled, so the variant-related settings above are preserved but do not take effect this run.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_SETTINGS.banned_pers: Manage content removed from relevant offer pools, including personas, variants, derivatives, tokens, and other relics. Changes apply to new runs only.
Manage, by category, which content is excluded from related selection pools. Changes apply to new runs only.
Move content between the available and banned lists.
{0}/{1} entries are currently banned. Changes apply to new runs only.
The BAN list has been updated. New runs will use the updated filter.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_SETTINGS.token_serie: Choose whether runs use two random expansions, all expansions, or no expansion series at all.
Enable only two deterministically randomized expansion series for this room.
Enable every expansion series for this room.
Disable all expansion series for this room.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_SETTINGS.lobby_panel: Controlled by the host, applies to this room only
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_SETTINGS.lucid_dream: Whenever you enter a Rest Site or shop, recover 25% of your current missing HP.
Your Block cannot exceed 100% of your max HP.
Debuffs applied to you by enemies gain 1 extra stack.
Skipped for now. This one is not planned for implementation.
Adds one extra random low-tier enemy to non-Boss and non-Elite rooms.
Max energy +4. Non-X cards that cost less than 4 cost 1 more; X-cost cards have their effect value reduced by 2.
Lucid Dream: Face Death with Composure
All units, ally or enemy, gain +100% base damage. Unfinished; not implemented yet.
All enemy units gain Hunterization, increasing damage, block gain, and HP by [blue](15 * map stage)%[/blue]. Unfinished; not implemented yet.
(Not implemented) All enemy units gain [purple]Phantom Skin[/purple].

Multi-target damage also deals [purple]50%[/purple] damage to other players. Explicit multi-hit damage retargets each hit to a [purple]random enemy or other player[/purple]. Killing any unit grants [purple]3 Strength[/purple].
Lucid Dream: Bubble Potion of Dreams
Resting no longer heals you and instead grants gold equal to the converted value multiplied by 3. Unfinished; not implemented yet.
Too troublesome to implement. Unfinished; not implemented yet.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_SETTINGS.enable_pure: Reserved toggle. It currently has no gameplay effect.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_SETTINGS.enable_play: Reserved toggle. It currently has no gameplay effect.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_SETTINGS.enable_rout: Reserved toggle. It currently has no gameplay effect.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_SETTINGS.enable_toke: Reserved toggle. It currently has no gameplay effect.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_SETTINGS.enable_auto: Reserved toggle. It currently has no gameplay effect.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_SETTINGS.telemetry.d: Manage anonymous balance telemetry at any time.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_SETTINGS.enable_tele: Allow anonymous usage statistics for personas, tokens, and skill cards.
Allow anonymized vanilla run history uploads for telemetry verification and diagnostics.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_SETTINGS.notificatio: Control general startup, settings, and telemetry notifications.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_SETTINGS.multiplayer: Control numbered multiplayer diagnostics for synchronization, relic obtain chains, and NEOW event-room divergence tracking.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_SETTINGS.enable_sett: Show notifications when Astral settings change.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_SETTINGS.enable_tele: Show anonymous telemetry success, warning, and error notifications.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_SETTINGS.enable_mult: Show important multiplayer selection and synchronization problem notifications.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_SETTINGS.enable_cons: Show the player, character, and effective command when someone executes a successful console command.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_SETTINGS.enable_pers: Show numbered diagnostic notifications for Astral persona, variant persona, and derivative relic issues.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_SETTINGS.enable_toke: Show numbered diagnostic notifications for Astral token relic fallback, obtain, and animation issues.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_SETTINGS.enable_neow: Show targeted numbered diagnostics for the post-persona NEOW, Ancient layout, event-room, and unusual-rarity divergence window.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_SETTINGS.enigmatic_s: Read-only reference for every Enigmatic Synthesis recipe. Red progress means the material is currently missing.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_TELEMETRY_POPUP.title: Anonymous Telemetry Notice
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_TELEMETRY_POPUP.body: This mod collects anonymous balance telemetry to analyze persona, token, and skill-card usage and win rates. It does not upload Steam IDs, player names, chat logs, or other direct identifiers. Choosing disable stops future uploads.
